title: RBI Withdrawal of Concentration Risk Exemptions for Government-Owned NBFCs
description: <cite index="22-1">The RBI mandated that NBFCs with an asset size of ₹1 trillion and above will be classified as upper-layer entities and subjected to enhanced regulatory oversight.</cite> <cite index="22-2,22-4">The directions come into force with immediate effect and bring government-owned entities under the same exposure norms as their regulatory peers.</cite>
